obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_61_: \E5* hey^1, wanna ride the ferris wheel?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_67_: \ER* Umm^1, what do you think^1, Kris?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_157: \E3* You..^1. actually want to go with me?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_158: \E8* What^1, so you can shake the ride and scare me again?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_197: \El* ..^1. you're not making me do anything./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_239: \EK* Cool^1, I'll just wait here I guess./%
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_270: * Yeah..^1. I'm still thinking about when we voted as kids./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_271: * Not in a million years would we have won./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_272: * Even our own ballots were spelled wrong./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_273: * We couldn't even agree on who should be King or Queen!/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_274: * Even so^1, I still cried my eyes out that we lost./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_275: * And so you told me^1, let's ride the Ferris Wheel./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_276: * ..^1. and then when we got on.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_277: * You just shook it^1, over and over and over again./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_300: * Now that I think about it.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_301: * That made me stop crying^1, didn't it?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_302: * I got so annoyed at you^1, I forgot all about the vote.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_303: * ..^1. and by the time we left the ride.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_304: * Losing didn't feel like such a big deal anymore./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_305: * ..^1. all this time^1, I thought you were teasing me^1, but.../
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_306: * ..^1. was that your way of cheering me up?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_342: * Gosh^1, you haven't grown up one bit^1, have you^1, Kris?/
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_358: * ..^1. really wanted to win in the first place^1, did you./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_359: * Everything back then^1, was just..^1. my imagination./
obj_town_mid_ferris_slash_Step_0_gml_360: * You were just..^1. doing what I made you./
